---
title: "Elizabeth Freeman (also known as Mum Bett)"
---

## Elizabeth Freeman (also known as Mum Bett)

**Dates:** (1742-1829)

### Description

anti-slavery campaigner

### Biography

She was the subject of a biography by Emily Taylor in the first series of <i>Biographies of Good Women</i> (1862).

### Letters

- Letter from March 18th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
